title: Harmful uses of patentable neurotechnology: a new regulatory approach : Proposing a framework safeguarding human rights and social responsibility for patented applications of neuroscience.
author_string: Nadler, R Roland, Spranger, Tade M, Rotenberg, Ari, Barretto, Tanya A, Hansmann, Julia et al.
abstract: The increasing ability of neuroscience to analyse and modulate human brain functions calls for a new regulatory approach to identify and deal with potential harmful applications in the early stages of development. [Image: see text]
